info.title: HIV.I Referral API
info.description: This tab describes the data that are collected during the referral workflow (HIV.I)

get.summary: JSON Schema definition for the Logical Model StructureDefinition-HIVIReferral
get.description: This endpoint serves the JSON Schema definition for the Logical Model StructureDefinition-HIVIReferral.

StructureDefinition-HIVIReferral.title: HIV.I Referral
StructureDefinition-HIVIReferral.description: This tab describes the data that are collected during the referral workflow (HIV.I)

resourceType.description: Resource type identifier for HIVIReferral logical model

@context.description: JSON-LD context for this logical model with ValueSet vocabularies

anyOf.description: URI reference to external JSON-LD context

@type.description: JSON-LD type identifier for HIVIReferral logical model

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.I.DE2

reasonForReferral.description: Reason why the client is being referred. If diagnosed, this may include the reason for the diagnosis.

referralForOtherGeneralServicesSpecify.description: If none of the reasons above apply, specify the reason(s)

anyTreatmentGivenBeforeReferral.description: If client was referred, was any treatment provided before referral?

locationOfScheduledReferralAppointment.description: Where the client is being referred to

dateReferralWasMade.description: The date the referral was made

providerWhoMadeReferral.description: The name of the provider who made the referral

providerFacility.description: Facility client is being referred from

providerTelephoneNumber.description: The contact details of the provider making the referral

referralNotes.description: Any additional relevant details of clinical significance for the referral facility to provide quality care

clientHistorySummary.description: With interoperable systems, the provider receiving the referral should be able to access the client's health record digitally. However, in the absence of this, the referral provider should receive a summary of the client's health records that includes the client's history, medications, medications prescribed or dispensed, reported issues and concerns, and any other relevant clinical information the health care provider had already obtained.
